steps.title: Support earlier discovery
steps.content: The sentence says technological advances in the twenty-first century made hoards easier to find, but many hoards had been found earlier. The example must accurately use the table to show hoard discoveries before 2000.

steps.title: Check the table dates
steps.content: Choice A gives the wrong date for the Balline Hoard. Choice B says since 1868, which does not clearly show pre-2000 discoveries. Choice D makes an unsupported claim about Carrick-on-Suir. The remaining choice accurately names two hoards found before 2000. The answer is C.
